title: Credits page
html:
Credits

You could be here too! Write a note to one of the poems, or a book review, and send it to a.arum@wxs.nl under the subject heading "add to TSE site"

this site owes its existence to the following people, in alphabetical order:

Arwin van Arum
student of English Literature,
Vrije Universiteit, Amsterdam
The Netherlands

On the Internet:: a.arum@wxs.nl
http://hem1.passagen.se/arwin/index.html

Contributions

general site layout, introductory pieces, notes on various poems...

Arwin van Arum
